narrative_beat: Close-up de revista analoga fechada sobre mesa, luz rasante vermelho-sangue, brasas flutuando

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: an unmarked leather-bound magazine lying closed on a dark polished wooden desk, its cover smooth and deep burgundy with no visible title or logo, harsh blood-red light raking across its surface from the right side, dense floating orange embers and ash particles surrounding it
subject.focal_point: the glossy burgundy magazine cover catching blood-red light
subject.secondary: polished dark wood desk surface with faint scratches, ash settling
props: dense floating orange embers and ash

environment.time_of_day: deep night, single blood-red light from right
environment.atmosphere: final warning, the object itself is the evidence

composition.foreground: burgundy magazine in rich crimson tones occupying center-left
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white darkness beyond desk edge

lighting.key_light: harsh blood-red light from right at low angle, raking across magazine surface
lighting.fill_light: faint amber glow from floating embers
lighting.shadow_quality: deep hard-edged shadow on the left side of the magazine

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, leather texture visible on magazine cover, dense floating orange embers

mood.emotion: final accusation, this is not just a magazine

symbolism.primary: the closed magazine as sealed evidence — the case is built
symbolism.secondary: blood-red light as the true color of its contents

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text, logos, or brand marks on the magazine
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only
tack-sharp focus on magazine surface texture

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
